# Documentation

[https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-harfbuzz-0.0.10/docs/GI-HarfBuzz.html](https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-harfbuzz-0.0.10/docs/GI-HarfBuzz.html)
